category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Rwanda RSB PVoC, energy label, and adopted IEC requirements.

title.en: China-to-Rwanda Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Rwanda RSB pre-export verification of conformity (PVoC), Certificate of Conformity, energy labelling / MEPS, and adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与卢旺达RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）、合格证书、能效标识/最低能效标准（MEPS）及采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與盧旺達RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）、合格證書、能效標識/最低能效標準（MEPS）及採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) standards, PVoC/Certificate of Conformity procedures, energy-labelling and MEPS thresholds, and RURA radio rules with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行卢旺达标准局（RSB）标准、PVoC/合格证书程序、能效标识及最低能效标准门槛值，以及RURA无线电规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行盧旺達標準局（RSB）標準、PVoC/合格證書程序、能效標識及最低能效標準門檻值，以及RURA無線電規則。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Rwanda compliance gaps: (1) RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) are mandatory per consignment before shipment — Chinese CCC/GB certification does not by itself produce a Rwanda CoC; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated against the Rwanda-adopted RS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard (IEC-based), so CCC test reports referencing GB 4706.13 may be re-used only where issued under an IECEE CB Scheme covering the relevant IEC edition; (3) energy performance must meet Rwanda's energy label / MEPS requirements, which use IEC 62552-based test methods and differ from China's GB 12021.2 grade system; (4) products are sold through an in-country importer and shipped via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam (Rwanda is landlocked). Rwanda's grid is 230 V / 50 Hz — same 50 Hz as China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned. Rwanda does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime; those EU requirements have no direct Rwanda equivalent. verified:false throughout — confirm against RSB before relying.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大卢旺达合规差距：（1）RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）及合格证书（CoC）为每批货物出货前的强制要求——中国CCC/GB认证本身不能直接产生卢旺达合格证书；（2）电气安全须依据卢旺达采纳的RS/IEC 60335-2-24标准（基于IEC）证明，因此引用GB 4706.13的CCC检测报告仅在依据涵盖相关IEC版本的IECEE CB体系出具时方可复用；（3）能效性能须满足卢旺达能效标识/最低能效标准（MEPS）要求，其采用基于IEC 62552的试验方法，与中国GB 12021.2等级体系不同；（4）产品通过当地进口商销售，并经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆港转运（卢旺达为内陆国）。卢旺达电网为230 V/50 Hz——与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压与中国220/380 V不同。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件。卢旺达不设类似欧盟的横向RoHS/电池/户外噪声制度；上述欧盟要求在卢旺达无直接对应规定。全文verified:false——在依赖前请向RSB核实。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大盧旺達合規差距：（1）RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）及合格證書（CoC）為每批貨物出貨前的強制要求——中國CCC/GB認證本身不能直接產生盧旺達合格證書；（2）電氣安全須依據盧旺達採納的RS/IEC 60335-2-24標準（基於IEC）證明，因此引用GB 4706.13的CCC檢測報告僅在依據涵蓋相關IEC版本的IECEE CB體系出具時方可複用；（3）能效性能須滿足盧旺達能效標識/最低能效標準（MEPS）要求，其採用基於IEC 62552的試驗方法，與中國GB 12021.2等級體系不同；（4）產品通過當地進口商銷售，並經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆港轉運（盧旺達為內陸國）。盧旺達電網為230 V/50 Hz——與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓與中國220/380 V不同。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件。盧旺達不設類似歐盟的橫向RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲制度；上述歐盟要求在盧旺達無直接對應規定。全文verified:false——在依賴前請向RSB核實。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change to RSB PVoC scheme, RS/IEC adoptions, or energy-label/MEPS thresholds
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official RSB, RURA, EAC, or primary IEC/ISO sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
